prestazioni: Engine swap to a GM L67 3.8L Supercharged V6 (engine code L67) with a custom-built Eaton M90 supercharger pulley upgrade to 2.70" (from stock 3.35") paired with a ZZP Stage 3 L67 Cylinder Head Package (ported heads, oversized valves, and upgraded valve springs) for 320+ HP at 8 PSI boost

Full custom 3" stainless steel exhaust system by Stainless Works with 4-2-1 headers, 304-grade merge collectors, and a Borla Pro XS muffler (part #40869) for optimized scavenging and a deep, aggressive tone without drone

Suspension overhaul with Bilstein B16 PSS9 coilovers (9-way adjustable damping) paired with Hotchkis Sport Suspension Sway Bars (front: 1-1/8", rear: 15/16") and Energy Suspension polyurethane bushings (part #9.5161G) for reduced body roll and improved turn-in response on the SSEi's G-body platform
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a Rare Rides Bonneville SSEi-specific kit (fiberglass fenders, quarter panels, and rocker extensions) with a 2" rear fender flare to accommodate 275/40/18 Nitto NT05 tires on 18x9.5" Enkei PF07 wheels (ET+15 offset)

Full custom front bumper lip and rear diffuser by RK Sport (part #RK-001-BON) with integrated LED fog lights (Morimoto XB LED, 5500K) and a carbon fiber hood (Seibon CF hood, part #CF-PON-92) with functional heat extractors for the L67 supercharger

Interior rework with Recaro SRD-X seats (90s JDM-inspired, part #SRD-X-92) wrapped in Alcantara (Autofab Designs) and custom door panels featuring OEM-style SSEi badging, a Momo Mod.78 steering wheel (380mm, perforated leather), and a full custom gauge cluster with AEM X-Series 30-0300 wideband AFR gauge and Defi BF series boost gauge (1.2 bar)
